title: malapoenna utilis
side_effects: Malapoenna utilis can have side effects if used improperly, such as severe allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. Improper use of the plant can also lead to gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. In rare cases, the plant can cause cardiovascular problems, including rapid heartbeat and low blood pressure. Additionally, long-term use of Malapoenna utilis can result in kidney damage and liver toxicity, requiring immediate medical attention.
